risk_title: Insecurity affecting implementation in Katsina State
risk_summary: Katsina State is experiencing security challenges that are impacting project implementation activities, particularly teacher deployment and school operations in the state.
evidence_quote: The deployment of newly recruited teachers to rural schools and urban schools with high pupil-teacher ratios has also been initiated in the OAK states. Under RA 3(Strengthening accountability for results), a teacher deployment and redeployment policy was developed and approved by the Executive Governors of the OAK states... 1,880 and 120 teachers have been redeployed in Katsina and Oyo states, respectively.

risk_title: Supply chain disruptions affecting project delivery timeline
risk_summary: Significant delays in tablet procurement due to supply chain issues and shipping delays are threatening timely implementation of the Structured Pedagogy Program and project closing deadline of October 2025.
evidence_quote: However, due to supply chain issues and shipping delays, the procurement of the 60,000 tablets has been significantly delayed (they did not arrive until mid-January 2025).

risk_title: Minimal progress on Structured Pedagogy Program implementation
risk_summary: The SPP activities under the PforR component have made minimal progress due to delays in completing preparatory work under the IPF component, affecting the core literacy improvement objective with limited time remaining before project closure.
evidence_quote: However, due to the delay in completing the preparatory work for the SPP under the Investment Project Financing (IPF) component, the SPP activities under the PforR component have made minimal progress.
